data.title: BitGo Goes Public on NYSE, Raises $212 Million
data.description:
BitGo debuted on NYSE with a $18 share price, marking the first U. S. cryptocurrency IPO in 2026.
source: https://coincu.com/news/bitgo-public-nyse-2026-ipo/

data.title: US stocks closed with most crypto stocks declining; the VIX fell 7.46%, while ETHZ rose 4.15%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.63%, the S&P 500 rose 5.16%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.91%. The crypto sector saw more declines than gains, with ETHZ closing up 4.15% and TRON up 1.27%; VIX closed down 7.46%, BMNR down 1.53%, and CRCL down 1.78%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Spot silver climbed above $97, setting a new all-time high.
data.description: Spot silver broke through $97 per ounce, setting a new all-time high, up 0.92% on the day.

data.title: DeepBook Margin is now live, bringing fully on-chain and composable leveraged trading capabilities to Sui.
data.description: DeepBook announced on X that it has launched its Margin leveraged trading feature. DeepBook Margin introduces fully on-chain and composable leveraged trading capabilities to Sui. Developers can directly embed leveraged trading processes into DApps via SDK and API without having to build their own risk engines or find liquidity; asset holders can earn passive income by providing liquidity to leveraged trading pools (such as staking dbUSDe).

data.title: Spot Gold Reaches Record High, Surpassing $4950 Per Ounce
data.description: Spot gold prices have surged, breaking through the $4950 per ounce mark to reach a historic high. According to Odaily, the current price stands at $4957 per ounce, reflecting a daily increase of 0.44%.

data.title: Bitmine Increases Ethereum Stake with Additional Deposit
data.description: On January 23, Bitmine has made another significant move in the cryptocurrency market by staking 171,264 ETH. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, this latest deposit adds to Bitmine's substantial holdings. Currently, Bitmine has staked a total of 1,943,200 ETH, reflecting its ongoing commitment to Ethereum investments.

data.title: TikTok Establishes U.S. Data Security Joint Venture
data.description: TikTok has announced the formation of TikTok USDS Joint Venture LLC, a company dedicated to safeguarding data, algorithm security, content review, and software protection for TikTok in the United States. According to PANews, the joint venture includes stakeholders such as General Atlantic, Silver Lake Capital, and MGX, each holding a 15% share. Additional investors include Vastmere Strategic Investment LLC, affiliated with Sequoia Capital, and Alpha Wave Partners. ByteDance retains a 19.9% stake, making it the largest single shareholder. The venture will be overseen by a seven-member board, which includes TikTok CEO Shou Zi Chew.

data.title: Capital One to Acquire Fintech Startup Brex for $5.15 Billion
data.description:
Capital One has agreed to acquire fintech startup Brex for $5.15 billion, according to CoinDesk. According to ChainCatcher, the transaction will be settled with a mix of 50% cash and 50% stock.

Founded in 2017, Brex provides corporate credit cards and cash management tools to startups and large enterprises. In September 2025, the company announced plans to introduce a native stablecoin payment feature, aiming to become the first global corporate card platform to support instant balance payments using stablecoins.

This acquisition will allow Capital One to establish a foothold in the emerging payment technology sector while integrating Brex into the mainstream banking system. Several blockchain companies, including Figure, Solana, and Alchemy, have joined the waiting list for Brex's stablecoin product.

Upon completion of the acquisition, Brex will be integrated into Capital One's commercial banking and payment operations.

data.title: Axie Infinity Tokens Surge Amid Major Tokenomics Reforms
data.description:
On January 23, Axie Infinity ecosystem tokens AXS and SLP have experienced significant growth over several weeks. According to BlockBeats, AXS has surged over 247% in the past 30 days, raising its market capitalization to $748 million, while SLP has increased by more than 42%, reaching a market cap of $38.48 million.

The primary driver behind this surge is the aggressive tokenomics reform introduced by Axie Infinity's developer, Sky Mavis, at the beginning of 2026. Starting January 7, the emission of SLP in the Origins mode was completely halted, effectively disrupting the 'farm-and-dump' cycle of automated bot farms. This move significantly reduced the daily supply of SLP, decreasing inflationary pressure by over 30% and alleviating long-term selling pressure.

Additionally, Sky Mavis introduced bAXS (Bonded AXS), a non-transferable token that replaces the previous freely tradable AXS game reward mechanism. The new token is bound to player accounts and can only be used for in-game consumption, staking, or governance. Players with high reputations benefit from lower transaction fees when selling, aiming to reward genuine players rather than short-term speculators, further creating supply contraction expectations and curbing bot proliferation.

These structural changes are considered the largest economic model overhaul for Axie Infinity since its peak in 2021. Co-founder Jihoz emphasized that 2026 will involve taking 'greater risks,' including upcoming content updates like Atia's Legacy MMO Beta, to revitalize player engagement and ensure ecosystem sustainability.

data.title: US Plans 25% Tariff on Iran Trading Partners
data.description:
President Trump announces 25% tariff on countries trading with Iran, impacting international relations.
source: https://coincu.com/news/us-tariff-iran-trading-partners/

data.title: Pendle investors or team addresses transferred 1.8 million Pendle tokens to Bybit, worth approximately $3.83 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, an address belonging to a Pendle investor or team transferred 1.8 million Pendle tokens (approximately $3.83 million) to Bybit seven hours ago. This address had previously received these 1.8 million Pendle tokens from the Pendle token vesting contract between April 2022 and April 2023, at which time they were worth only $266,000. After unlocking, the address did not immediately sell them but held them until now, increasing their value from $266,000 to $3.83 million.

data.title: The SEC and CFTC will hold a joint event next week on the coordination of cryptocurrency regulation.
data.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) announced on Twitter that it will co-host a forum with the Cross-Border Financial Commission (CFTC) next week on "Coordination and U.S. Financial Leadership in the Crypto Age." The event will be held at CFTC headquarters, open to the public, and streamed live on the CFTC's official website.

data.title: WLFI and Spacecoin enter into a strategic partnership and conduct a token swap.
data.description: The Trump family's crypto project WLFI has entered into a strategic partnership and token swap with blockchain satellite network project Spacecoin. The two companies will jointly develop solutions that integrate decentralized finance (DeFi) technology with satellite internet connectivity. Spacecoin has already successfully launched three satellites into orbit, and the project aims to provide permissionless global internet access. WLFI co-founder Zak Folkman stated that Spacecoin is solving a real infrastructure problem: expanding internet access by building space-based connections.

data.title: SEC and CFTC to Host Joint Event on Crypto Coordination and U.S. Financial Leadership
data.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has announced a collaborative event with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) scheduled for next week. According to Odaily, the event, titled 'Coordination in the Crypto Era and U.S. Financial Leadership,' will take place at the CFTC headquarters. It will be open to the public and streamed live on the official website.

data.title: Binance continues its USD1 subsidy program, airdropping a total of $40 million worth of WLFI.
data.description: Binance has officially announced that, starting January 23, 2026 at 08:00 (UTC+8), Binance will launch an airdrop event for eligible users holding World Liberty Financial USD (USD1) on the platform. Eligible users will share a total prize pool of $40 million worth of World Liberty Financial (WLFI). During the event, WLFI rewards will be distributed weekly to users holding USD1. The first airdrop will be distributed on February 2, 2026, covering rewards from January 23, 2026 at 08:00 to January 30, 2026 at 08:00 (UTC+8). Subsequent rewards will be distributed every Friday.

data.title: The second season of Cap's points event, Homestead, will run from January 29th to July 23rd.
data.description: Stablecoin project Cap has announced the details of its second-quarter points program, Homestead, which will run from January 29th to July 23rd. Similar to the first-quarter program, Frontier, users can choose between points or rewards: stcUSD will offer rewards in the form of cUSD, paid out daily; users who choose points can earn rewards by holding cUSD, Pendle cUSD YT and LP, Pendle stcUSD YT and LP, or by providing stablecoin loans to stcUSD and Cap PT in the lending market.

data.title: Spot gold rose above $4,950 per ounce, setting a new all-time high.
data.description: Spot gold rose above $4,950 per ounce to a new all-time high, currently trading at $4,957 per ounce, up 0.44% on the day.

data.title: Farcaster founder clarifies: The protocol is currently functioning normally, and the funds for the home purchase came from Coinbase IPO proceeds.
data.description: Farcaster founder Dan Romero clarifies the following points regarding market rumors: 1. Farcaster has no plans to shut down. The protocol is currently functioning normally and will continue to operate stably in the future. As of December last year, it had 250,000 monthly active users and over 100,000 deposited wallets. The acquiring company, Neynar, is a venture-backed startup that plans to shift Farcaster towards a more developer-focused approach. 2. Regarding the Merkle project, we plan to return all $180 million raised to investors. Over the past five years, we have consistently strived to manage investor funds prudently. 3. Finally, it should be noted that the funds used to purchase the property came from the proceeds of Coinbase's initial public offering (IPO).

data.title: Bitmine has staked another 171,264 ETH, bringing its total staked amount to 1,943,200 ETH.
data.description: Onchain Lens monitoring shows that the Bitmine address has staked another 171,264 ETH, worth approximately $503.24 million. Its total staked ETH now amounts to 1,943,200 ETH, with a total value of approximately $5.73 billion.
